name: Personal accident vs life insurance comparison
description: User wants to understand how personal accident insurance differs from life insurance

input.message: What is the difference between personal accident insurance and life insurance?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response clearly contrast PA insurance with life insurance?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it explain that PA covers only accidental death while life (term) covers all-cause death?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Does it correctly state that PA also covers disability benefits which life insurance typically does not?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No misleading claims about coverage scope? Appropriate disclaimer?
